name: annoty
description: Annoty CLI tool for authentication and project initialization

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.resolve('..', 'overlay', 'dist', 'overlay.js'); const dest = path.resolve('dist', 'overlay.js'); if (fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.copyFileSync(src, dest); console.log('Successfully copied overlay.js to dist'); } else { console.log('Warning: overlay.js not found in overlay/dist'); }"
